tZh: Magistral：Mistral的首个推理模型与可扩展强化学习管线
sEn: We introduce Magistral, Mistral's first reasoning model trained purely via RL, showing that RL on text data preserves multimodal understanding and instruction following.
sZh: 我们推出Magistral，Mistral首个推理模型，通过纯强化学习训练，证明文本数据上的RL能保持多模态理解和指令遵循能力。
absEn: We introduce Magistral, Mistral's first reasoning model and our own scalable reinforcement learning (RL) pipeline. Instead of relying on existing implementations and RL traces distilled from prior models, we follow a ground up approach, relying solely on our own models and infrastructure. Notably, we demonstrate a stack that enabled us to explore the limits of pure RL training of LLMs, present a simple method to force the reasoning language of the model, and show that RL on text data alone maintains most of the initial checkpoint's capabilities. We find that RL on text maintains or improves multimodal understanding, instruction following and function calling. We present Magistral Medium, trained for reasoning on top of Mistral Medium 3 with RL alone, and we open-source Magistral Small (Apache 2.0) which further includes cold-start data from Magistral Medium.
absZh: 我们介绍了Magistral，这是Mistral的第一个推理模型，也是我们自己的可扩展强化学习（RL）管线。我们没有依赖现有实现或从先前模型中提取的RL轨迹，而是从头开始，完全依靠我们自己的模型和基础设施。值得注意的是，我们展示了一个能够探索LLM纯RL训练极限的堆栈，提出了一种强制模型使用推理语言的简单方法，并表明仅对文本数据进行RL训练能保持初始检查点的大部分能力。我们发现，文本上的RL能保持或提升多模态理解、指令遵循和函数调用能力。我们发布了Magistral Medium，它在Mistral Medium 3之上仅通过RL训练推理能力，并开源了Magistral Small（Apache 2.0），其中进一步包含了来自Magistral Medium的冷启动数据。

contrib.en: Introduced Magistral, Mistral's first reasoning model trained via a scalable RL pipeline from scratch.
contrib.zh: 提出了Magistral，Mistral首个通过可扩展强化学习管道从头训练的推理模型。

contrib.en: Demonstrated that pure RL on text data preserves or improves multimodal understanding, instruction following, and function calling.
contrib.zh: 证明了纯文本强化学习能保持或提升多模态理解、指令遵循和函数调用能力。

contrib.en: Presented a simple method to enforce multilingual reasoning by rewarding language consistency.
contrib.zh: 提出了一种通过奖励语言一致性来强制多语言推理的简单方法。

contrib.en: Developed an asynchronous distributed RL infrastructure enabling efficient on-policy training with frequent weight updates.
contrib.zh: 开发了异步分布式强化学习基础设施，支持频繁权重更新的高效在策略训练。

contrib.en: Showed that RL alone on a 24B model achieves performance comparable to distillation-based methods.
contrib.zh: 展示了仅用强化学习在24B模型上能达到与基于蒸馏方法相当的性能。

contrib.en: Open-sourced Magistral Small (24B) under Apache 2.0 license.
contrib.zh: 以Apache 2.0许可证开源了Magistral Small（24B）模型。

limits.en: RL training relies on verifiable rewards, limiting applicability to tasks with objective correctness.
limits.zh: 强化学习训练依赖可验证奖励，限制了其在需要客观正确性任务之外的适用性。

limits.en: Multilingual performance degrades 4-10% compared to English due to language constraints.
limits.zh: 由于语言约束，多语言性能相比英语下降4-10%。

limits.en: The method requires extensive data filtering and two-stage difficulty curation.
limits.zh: 该方法需要大量数据过滤和两阶段难度筛选。

limits.en: Proportional rewards for code tasks led to slightly lower final performance than binary rewards.
limits.zh: 代码任务的比例奖励导致最终性能略低于二元奖励。

limits.en: Entropy bonus was unstable and replaced by Clip-Higher strategy for exploration control.
limits.zh: 熵奖励不稳定，被Clip-Higher策略取代以控制探索。

items.en: We introduce Magistral, Mistral’s first reasoning model and our own scalable reinforcement learning (RL) pipeline. Instead of relying on existing implementations and RL traces distilled from prior models, we follow a ground up approach, relying solely on our own models and infrastructure. Notably, we demonstrate a stack that enabled us to explore the limits of pure RL training of LLMs, present a simple method to force the reasoning language of the model, and show that RL on text data alone maintains most of the initial checkpoint’s capabilities. We find that RL on text maintains or improves multimodal understanding, instruction following and function calling. We present Magistral Medium, trained for reasoning on top of Mistral Medium 3 with RL alone, and we open-source Magistral Small (Apache 2.0) which further includes cold-start data from Magistral Medium.
items.zh: 我们推出 Magistral，这是 Mistral 的首个推理模型，也是我们自己的可扩展强化学习（RL）流水线。我们没有依赖现有实现或从先前模型中提取的 RL 轨迹，而是采用从头构建的方法，完全依靠我们自己的模型和基础设施。值得注意的是，我们展示了一个能够探索纯 RL 训练 LLM 极限的堆栈，提出了一种强制模型推理语言的简单方法，并表明仅对文本数据进行 RL 训练可以保留初始检查点的大部分能力。我们发现，文本上的 RL 能够保持或提升多模态理解、指令遵循和函数调用能力。我们推出了 Magistral Medium，它仅通过 RL 在 Mistral Medium 3 之上进行推理训练，并开源了 Magistral Small（Apache 2.0），其中进一步包含了来自 Magistral Medium 的冷启动数据。

items.en: Enhancing the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs) has emerged as a key frontier in modern AI research. Reasoning models such as o1 [Jaech et al., 2024] differ widely from classic chatbots, leveraging longer chains-of-thought to improve performance on complex tasks. The seminal work by DeepSeek-AI et al. [2025] gave the community crucial insights on the Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) recipe, for creating reasoning models at scale.
items.zh: 增强大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力已成为现代人工智能研究的关键前沿。像 o1 [Jaech et al., 2024] 这样的推理模型与经典聊天机器人有很大不同，它们利用更长的思维链来提升复杂任务上的性能。DeepSeek-AI 等人 [2025] 的开创性工作为社区提供了关于基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）方法的关键见解，用于大规模创建推理模型。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce Mistral’s first reasoning models: Magistral Small and Magistral Medium, based on the Mistral Small 3 and Mistral Medium 3 models respectively, and outline our proposed RLVR framework in detail. The key contributions of our paper are the following:
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Mistral 的首批推理模型：Magistral Small 和 Magistral Medium，它们分别基于 Mistral Small 3 和 Mistral Medium 3 模型，并详细概述了我们提出的 RLVR 框架。本文的主要贡献如下：

items.en: We present in detail how we trained Magistral Medium with RL alone, with no distillation from pre-existing reasoning models, yielding a nearly 50% boost in AIME-24 (pass@1).
items.zh: 我们详细介绍了如何仅通过 RL 训练 Magistral Medium，无需从现有推理模型中蒸馏，从而在 AIME-24（pass@1）上实现了近 50% 的提升。

items.en: We discuss in depth the infrastructure and design choices that enable large-scale online RL. Our asynchronous system enables fast, continuous RL training by updating generators frequently without interrupting them, balancing efficiency with on-policyness.
items.zh: 我们深入讨论了支持大规模在线 RL 的基础设施和设计选择。我们的异步系统通过频繁更新生成器而不中断它们，实现了快速、连续的 RL 训练，在效率和策略一致性之间取得了平衡。

items.en: We present a simple yet effective strategy to make the model multilingual, where both the chain-of-thought and the final response are written in the user’s language.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种简单而有效的策略，使模型具备多语言能力，其中思维链和最终回答均使用用户的语言书写。

items.en: We contribute insights that add to, or contradict, existing RLVR literature, for example on whether RL can improve upon the distillation SFT baseline for small models. We also show that multimodal reasoning capabilities emerge with online RL with textual data on top of a multimodal model. We share the results of our unsuccessful experiments.
items.zh: 我们贡献的见解对现有 RLVR 文献进行了补充或反驳，例如关于 RL 能否在小模型上改进蒸馏 SFT 基线的问题。我们还展示了，在多模态模型之上使用文本数据进行在线 RL 可以涌现出多模态推理能力。我们分享了不成功实验的结果。

items.en: We release the weights of Magistral Small (24B) under the Apache 2 license111https://huggingface.co/mistralai/Magistral-Small-2506.
items.zh: 我们在 Apache 2 许可下发布了 Magistral Small（24B）的权重。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Performance of Magistral Medium on common reasoning benchmarks. We highlight the strength of our proposed RLVR framework, which yields a 50% increase in AIME-24 (pass@1) over the initial Mistral Medium 3 checkpoint, without any cold-start reasoning traces. We compare against analogous results from [DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025], which show RL improvements from DeepSeek-v3 to DeepSeek-R1 (January 25). Magistral Medium reaches 90% accuracy on AIME-24 with majority voting.
items.capZh: 图 1：Magistral Medium 在常见推理基准上的性能。我们强调了所提出的 RLVR 框架的优势，该框架在没有任何冷启动推理轨迹的情况下，相对于初始 Mistral Medium 3 检查点，在 AIME-24（pass@1）上实现了 50% 的提升。我们与 [DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025] 的类似结果进行了比较，后者展示了从 DeepSeek-v3 到 DeepSeek-R1（2025 年 1 月）的 RL 改进。Magistral Medium 在 AIME-24 上通过多数投票达到了 90% 的准确率。

items.en: The paper is organized as follows: Section 2 details the RL algorithm we used, along with the design choices implemented to guide the reasoning models in terms of language and format; Section 3 presents our scalable infrastructure that supports efficient training on a large cluster of GPUs; Section 4 discusses the data selection process we employed for efficient and effective training; Section 5 presents the performance of Magistral on reasoning and multilingual benchmarks; Section 6 shows the ablations done to motivate the training choices; Section 7 presents a PCA-based study of the model weights’ trajectory during RL, demonstrates that RL on text data preserves or even improves multimodal capabilities, and includes methods that worked poorly for Magistral; Section 8 shows that one can train a model to perform on par with R1 with distillation followed by RL, which we did not use for Magistral Medium; Finally, we conclude with some future directions in Section 9.
items.zh: 本文组织如下：第 2 节详细介绍了我们使用的 RL 算法，以及为引导推理模型在语言和格式方面所做的设计选择；第 3 节介绍了支持在大型 GPU 集群上高效训练的可扩展基础设施；第 4 节讨论了为实现高效有效训练所采用的数据选择过程；第 5 节展示了 Magistral 在推理和多语言基准上的性能；第 6 节展示了为论证训练选择所做的消融实验；第 7 节展示了基于 PCA 的模型权重在 RL 过程中的轨迹研究，证明了文本数据上的 RL 能够保留甚至提升多模态能力，并包含了 Magistral 中效果不佳的方法；第 8 节展示了可以通过蒸馏后 RL 训练出与 R1 性能相当的模型，但我们未将其用于 Magistral Medium；最后，我们在第 9 节总结并展望了未来方向。

items.en: In this section, we outline the training methodology used to develop the Magistral models. This includes our optimizations of the GRPO algorithm for training stability (Section 2.1) and our training reward to improve both mathematical and coding capabilities, while ensuring the model adheres to proper format, length, and language usage (Section 2.2).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们概述了用于开发 Magistral 模型的训练方法。这包括我们对 GRPO 算法在训练稳定性方面的优化（第 2.1 节），以及我们的训练奖励，旨在提升数学和编码能力，同时确保模型遵循正确的格式、长度和语言使用（第 2.2 节）。

items.en: We use Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) [Shao et al., 2024] as our RL algorithm. Unlike PPO [Schulman et al., 2017], GRPO eliminates the need for a ‘critic model’, and instead uses the average reward from multiple generations per prompt from the policy to compute a baseline for advantage calculation. Specifically, GRPO optimizes the policy πθ\pi_{\theta} to maximize the following objective:
items.zh: 我们使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）[Shao et al., 2024] 作为我们的 RL 算法。与 PPO [Schulman et al., 2017] 不同，GRPO 消除了对“评论家模型”的需求，而是使用策略对每个提示的多次生成的平均奖励来计算优势的基线。具体来说，GRPO 优化策略 πθ\pi_{\theta} 以最大化以下目标：

items.en: where qq represents queries drawn from the input dataset, oo represents the generation of the model, ε\varepsilon is the PPO clipping threshold, β\beta is the KL penalty coefficient, and DKLD_{\mathrm{KL}} denotes the Kullback–Leibler divergence between the current policy πθ\pi_{\theta} and the reference policy πref\pi_{\text{ref}}. The relative advantage, or the group normalized advantage, is given by A^i,t=ri−μσ\hat{A}_{i,t}=\frac{r_{i}-\mu}{\sigma} where μ\mu and σ\sigma are the mean and standard deviation of rewards computed within a single group. Building on prior work adapting GRPO for reasoning tasks [Yu et al., 2025, Liu et al., 2025, Hu et al., 2025], we introduced several modifications:
items.zh: 其中 qq 表示从输入数据集中抽取的查询，oo 表示模型的生成，ε\varepsilon 是 PPO 裁剪阈值，β\beta 是 KL 惩罚系数，DKLD_{\mathrm{KL}} 表示当前策略 πθ\pi_{\theta} 与参考策略 πref\pi_{\text{ref}} 之间的 Kullback–Leibler 散度。相对优势，即组归一化优势，由 A^i,t=ri−μσ\hat{A}_{i,t}=\frac{r_{i}-\mu}{\sigma} 给出，其中 μ\mu 和 σ\sigma 是单个组内奖励的均值和标准差。基于先前将 GRPO 应用于推理任务的工作 [Yu et al., 2025, Liu et al., 2025, Hu et al., 2025]，我们引入了若干修改：

items.en: Eliminating KL divergence. The KL divergence penalty constrains the online policy from deviating too much from a reference policy, helping to maintain alignment with the initial model. However, in GRPO, the policy diverges substantially regardless, and maintaining a copy of the reference model for KL computation incurs a compute cost we find unjustified. We remove the KL penalty entirely.
items.zh: 消除 KL 散度。KL 散度惩罚约束在线策略不要偏离参考策略太远，有助于保持与初始模型的对齐。然而，在 GRPO 中，策略无论如何都会大幅偏离，并且为 KL 计算维护参考模型的副本会带来我们认为不合理的计算成本。我们完全移除了 KL 惩罚。

items.en: Loss normalization. To avoid introducing length biases between generations in one group, we normalize the loss by first adding token-wise loss for all tokens and all generations and then dividing by the total length of generations in the group ∑i=1G|oi|\sum_{i=1}^{G}|o_{i}|.
items.zh: 损失归一化。为避免在组内不同生成之间引入长度偏差，我们首先计算组内所有生成的所有 token 的逐 token 损失之和，然后除以组内生成的总长度 ∑i=1G|oi|\sum_{i=1}^{G}|o_{i}| 来归一化损失。

items.en: Advantage normalization. We estimate the advantage of each token simply as A^i,t=A^i=ri−μ\hat{A}_{i,t}=\hat{A}_{i}=r_{i}-\mu, where μ\mu is the mean of rewards within a group. Following Andrychowicz et al. [2020], we additionally normalize the advantages in each minibatch as A^i,tnorm=(A^i−A^mean)/A^std\hat{A}_{i,t}^{\text{norm}}=(\hat{A}_{i}-\hat{A}^{\text{mean}})/\hat{A}^{\text{std}} where A^mean\hat{A}^{\text{mean}} and A^std\hat{A}^{\text{std}} are the sequence-wise mean and standard deviation of the advantages A^i\hat{A}_{i} in a minibatch.
items.zh: 优势归一化。我们简单地将每个 token 的优势估计为 A^i,t=A^i=ri−μ\hat{A}_{i,t}=\hat{A}_{i}=r_{i}-\mu，其中 μ\mu 是组内奖励的均值。遵循 Andrychowicz 等人 [2020] 的做法，我们进一步在每个小批量中将优势归一化为 A^i,tnorm=(A^i−A^mean)/A^std\hat{A}_{i,t}^{\text{norm}}=(\hat{A}_{i}-\hat{A}^{\text{mean}})/\hat{A}^{\text{std}}，其中 A^mean\hat{A}^{\text{mean}} 和 A^std\hat{A}^{\text{std}} 是小批量中优势 A^i\hat{A}_{i} 的序列级均值和标准差。

items.en: Relaxing the trust region’s upper bound. We allow the model to explore rare but potentially insightful reasoning steps, preventing deterministic policies. We adopt the Clip-Higher [Yu et al., 2025] strategy to address entropy collapse. In standard GRPO, ε\varepsilon-clipping limits exploration by restricting the increase in probability of low-likelihood tokens, hindering the reinforcement of rare but important reasoning paths. By increasing the upper clipping threshold to εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}}, low-probability tokens have more room to grow, enhancing entropy and diversity in outputs, and improving reasoning exploration. We found that careful tuning of εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} is crucial to maintaining stability in the RL run. We adjusted it between 0.26 and 0.28 during the training to keep the group entropy stable.
items.zh: 放宽信任区域的上界。我们允许模型探索罕见但可能具有洞察力的推理步骤，防止策略变得确定性。我们采用 Clip-Higher [Yu et al., 2025] 策略来解决熵崩溃问题。在标准 GRPO 中，ε\varepsilon 裁剪通过限制低似然 token 概率的增加来限制探索，阻碍了罕见但重要的推理路径的强化。通过将上裁剪阈值提高到 εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}}，低概率 token 有更多增长空间，从而增强输出的熵和多样性，并改善推理探索。我们发现，仔细调整 εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} 对于保持 RL 运行的稳定性至关重要。我们在训练期间将其调整在 0.26 到 0.28 之间，以保持组熵稳定。

items.en: Eliminating non-diverse groups. Groups where all generations are either entirely correct or wrong have zero advantage and therefore contribute nothing to the batch loss. This results in smaller gradients with increased noise sensitivity. To address this, we filter out all groups with zero advantage when forming training batches.
items.zh: 消除非多样化组。所有生成要么完全正确要么完全错误的组具有零优势，因此对批量损失没有贡献。这会导致梯度变小且对噪声更敏感。为解决此问题，我们在形成训练批次时过滤掉所有优势为零的组。

items.en: The final GRPO loss with all modifications highlighted in red is
items.zh: 最终包含所有修改（以红色突出显示）的 GRPO 损失为

items.en: Choosing the appropriate reward is crucial for the RL algorithm to work effectively. During training, model generations are evaluated along four axes: formatting, correctness, length, and language consistency, which we describe below.
items.zh: 选择合适的奖励对于 RL 算法的有效工作至关重要。在训练期间，模型生成沿四个维度进行评估：格式、正确性、长度和语言一致性，我们将在下面描述。

items.en: For both math and code problems, we instruct the model to follow a specific format, which facilitates the extraction of the model’s answer:
items.zh: 对于数学和代码问题，我们指示模型遵循特定格式，以便于提取模型的答案：

items.en: Tag requirements: (i) The model response must start with a <think> tag and must include a corresponding </think> tag. (ii) There should be exactly one set of these tags present in the response.
items.zh: 标签要求：(i) 模型响应必须以 <think> 标签开头，并且必须包含对应的 </think> 标签。(ii) 响应中应恰好存在一组这样的标签。

items.en: Mathematical responses: For mathematical outputs, the response must include the final answer enclosed in \boxed{} within the answer section, following the </think> tag.
items.zh: 数学响应：对于数学输出，响应必须在答案部分（</think> 标签之后）包含用 \boxed{} 括起来的最终答案。

items.en: Code responses: For code outputs, the response must include at least one markdown block, formatted with triple backticks followed by the programming language specification, in the answer section.
items.zh: 代码响应：对于代码输出，响应必须在答案部分包含至少一个 Markdown 代码块，格式为三重反引号后跟编程语言说明。

items.en: Failure to meet any of these conditions results in a reward of 0, and the response will not be graded further. Otherwise, the response gets a reward of 0.1 and proceeds to grading.
items.zh: 未能满足这些条件中的任何一个将导致奖励为 0，并且响应将不再进行评分。否则，响应将获得 0.1 的奖励并进入评分阶段。

items.en: If the generated answer follows the required formatting, we extract the model solution and use a verifier to assess its correctness.
items.zh: 如果生成的答案符合要求的格式，我们提取模型解决方案并使用验证器评估其正确性。

items.en: Math correctness. The final answer is extracted from inside the last \boxed{} in the solution and compared against the reference answer using a rule-based verifier. It normalizes both the ground-truth and the generated answer to correctly reward semantically identical responses with different syntaxes. We leverage a combination of different parsers and SymPy222https://www.sympy.org/en/index.html to evaluate outputs and compare them to the original ground truth. An additional reward of 0.9 is given if the answer is correct, making the total reward 1.0.
items.zh: 数学正确性：最终答案从解决方案中最后一个 \boxed{} 内提取，并使用基于规则的验证器与参考答案进行比较。该验证器会标准化真实答案和生成的答案，以正确奖励语义相同但语法不同的响应。我们结合使用不同的解析器和 SymPy（https://www.sympy.org/en/index.html）来评估输出并将其与原始真实答案进行比较。如果答案正确，则额外奖励 0.9，使总奖励达到 1.0。

items.en: Code correctness. Code is extracted from the first markdown code block in the answer section. If the code is written in C++, it is compiled with a timeout of 10 seconds, using the C++20 standard. We pre-compile the bits/stdc++.h standard library header, which is commonly used in competitive programming, to speed up the compilation process. We randomly select 20 tests from the available test cases, ensuring that the same tests are used within a given response group. The code is then executed against these tests, with each test having a timeout of 4 seconds and a memory limit of 300 MB. An additional reward of 0.9 is given if the code successfully passes all the tests.
items.zh: 代码正确性：代码从答案部分中的第一个 Markdown 代码块中提取。如果代码是用 C++ 编写的，则使用 C++20 标准编译，超时时间为 10 秒。我们预编译了竞赛编程中常用的 bits/stdc++.h 标准库头文件，以加快编译过程。我们从可用的测试用例中随机选择 20 个测试，确保在给定的响应组内使用相同的测试。然后对代码执行这些测试，每个测试的超时时间为 4 秒，内存限制为 300 MB。如果代码成功通过所有测试，则额外奖励 0.9。

items.en: Following [Yu et al., 2025], we use soft length penalty to signal the model that the hard cutoff on maximal completion length is near. We fix two lengths lmaxl_{\text{max}} and lcachel_{\text{cache}} and compute length penalty as

items.en: A core design principle for Magistral is for it to reason in the same language as the user. Reinforcement learning on math and coding problems without any treatment often results in mixed-language model responses. In preliminary experiments without language constraints, we frequently observed outputs that mixed English, Chinese, and Russian words. While these outputs were coherent, they were undesirable from a user perspective.
items.zh: Magistral 的一个核心设计原则是使用与用户相同的语言进行推理。在数学和编码问题上进行强化学习而不进行任何处理通常会导致模型响应出现混合语言。在没有语言约束的初步实验中，我们经常观察到输出混合了英语、中文和俄语单词。虽然这些输出是连贯的，但从用户角度来看是不可取的。

items.en: To prevent language switching, we translated 10% of our problems written in English to the following languages: French, Spanish, Italian, German, Chinese, and Russian. When calculating the reward for a conversation—a triple of ((problem, thoughts, answer))—we first normalized each of the three components by removing LaTeX content and code blocks, and then applied a fastText classifier [Joulin et al., 2016] to each. If the classifier indicates that all three parts used the same language, we give an additional reward of 0.10.1.
items.zh: 为了防止语言切换，我们将 10% 的英文问题翻译成以下语言：法语、西班牙语、意大利语、德语、中文和俄语。在计算对话（问题、思考、答案的三元组）的奖励时，我们首先通过删除 LaTeX 内容和代码块来标准化三个组件中的每一个，然后对每个组件应用 fastText 分类器 [Joulin et al., 2016]。如果分类器指示所有三个部分使用相同的语言，我们给予 0.1 的额外奖励。

items.en: These simple modifications are sufficient to enable the model to closely follow the language of the user, with minimal code-switching, while maintaining performance on reasoning tasks. Although we only translated the original English problems into a few languages, we observed that the model could successfully generate chains of thought in arbitrary languages.
items.zh: 这些简单的修改足以使模型能够紧密遵循用户的语言，同时保持推理任务的性能，并最大限度地减少代码切换。尽管我们只将原始英文问题翻译成了少数几种语言，但我们观察到模型能够成功生成任意语言的思维链。

items.en: System prompt. We specify the format and the language requirements in the system prompt, which can be found in Figure 2. We find that RL training is quite sensitive to the system prompt we use. For example, the Be as casual and as long as you want part of the system prompt increases the entropy of the model and therefore improves the exploration of the model.
items.zh: 系统提示。我们在系统提示中指定了格式和语言要求，如图 2 所示。我们发现 RL 训练对我们使用的系统提示非常敏感。例如，系统提示中的“Be as casual and as long as you want”部分增加了模型的熵，从而改善了模型的探索。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Online training pipeline. 1) Generators continuously output completions to prompts from input data sources. 2) Whenever a completion is finished, it is sent to the appropriate verifier. 3) Each sequence is sent to a different data parallel group using a pre-set permutation until every data parallel group has enough sequences to form a batch. 4) A single gradient step is performed and the trainer and generators are updated. In the generators, weights are replaced mid-generation, which means that in-flight generations continue with a slightly outdated key-value cache, as we do not refresh the cache. Since the model resides on GPUs in both the trainer and the generators, the weights are transferred using NCCL for optimal performance. The model weights are dynamically consolidated to accommodate the different sharding topologies between trainers and generators.
items.capZh: 图 3：在线训练流程。1) 生成器持续对来自输入数据源的提示输出补全。2) 每当补全完成时，它被发送到相应的验证器。3) 每个序列使用预设的排列发送到不同的数据并行组，直到每个数据并行组有足够的序列形成一个批次。4) 执行单个梯度步骤，并更新训练器和生成器。在生成器中，权重在生成过程中被替换，这意味着正在进行的生成会使用略微过时的键值缓存继续，因为我们不会刷新缓存。由于模型同时驻留在训练器和生成器的 GPU 上，因此使用 NCCL 传输权重以获得最佳性能。模型权重会动态合并，以适应训练器和生成器之间不同的分片拓扑。

items.en: In this section, we present our infrastructure for online training. We adopt a distributed RL training system similar to those proposed in several prior works [Espeholt et al., 2018, Hu et al., 2024, Noukhovitch et al., 2024, Sheng et al., 2024, Wu et al., 2025] that coordinates three kinds of workers:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍用于在线训练的基础设施。我们采用类似于先前多项工作中提出的分布式 RL 训练系统 [Espeholt et al., 2018, Hu et al., 2024, Noukhovitch et al., 2024, Sheng et al., 2024, Wu et al., 2025]，该系统协调三种工作节点：

items.en: Trainers maintain the main copy of the model weights and perform gradient updates.
items.zh: 训练器：维护模型权重的主副本并执行梯度更新。

items.en: Generators perform ‘roll-outs’, using the latest policy to return completions with log-probabilities from the training prompts.
items.zh: 生成器：执行“roll-outs”，使用最新策略从训练提示中返回带有对数概率的补全。

items.en: Verifiers evaluate the completions produced by the generators and return a reward (see Section 2.2 for details).
items.zh: 验证器：评估生成器产生的补全并返回奖励（详见第 2.2 节）。

items.en: Generators are a significant part of the total compute and the part that’s unique to online RL. Their workload is highly heterogeneous and hard to predict as the distribution of sequence lengths is highly skewed and changes over the course of training: the longest completions can take up to 5 times longer than the shortest. One of the main constraints of the system is to introduce no bias on sequence lengths: the distribution of completion lengths must be exactly that of the training data, even though shorter completions finish more quickly. A competing goal is to update the generator weights as soon as possible. We want the generations to be as on-policy as possible, but we also want the generators to operate without waiting for each other or the trainers.
items.zh: 生成器是总算力的重要组成部分，也是在线 RL 特有的部分。它们的工作负载高度异构且难以预测，因为序列长度的分布高度偏斜并在训练过程中变化：最长的补全可能比最短的补全多花费 5 倍的时间。系统的主要约束之一是不引入序列长度偏差：补全长度的分布必须与训练数据的分布完全相同，即使较短的补全完成得更快。另一个竞争目标是尽快更新生成器权重。我们希望生成尽可能在策略上，但我们也希望生成器无需相互等待或等待训练器即可运行。

items.en: In order to train without any approximation, we could process batches sequentially: start generators on a batch, wait for all sequences to complete, update the model weights for both trainers and generators, and repeat. However, this approach leads to idle generators and low pipeline efficiency due to heterogeneous completion times. Instead, we prioritize efficiency and operate the generators continuously at maximum throughput without ever waiting for the trainers. We constantly gather groups from the generators, verify them, and update the trainers. After these updates, the trainers send the new weights to the generators via NCCL, without discarding the in-flight sequences currently being generated. Broadcasting weights from GPUs to GPUs is crucial as it reduces the time required for a single update to below 5 seconds, even with large models and large world sizes. We illustrate this process in Figure 3.
items.zh: 为了在没有近似的情况下进行训练，我们可以顺序处理批次：在批次上启动生成器，等待所有序列完成，更新训练器和生成器的模型权重，然后重复。然而，由于补全时间异构，这种方法会导致生成器空闲和流水线效率低下。相反，我们优先考虑效率，并以最大吞吐量连续运行生成器，无需等待训练器。我们不断从生成器收集组，验证它们，并更新训练器。在这些更新之后，训练器通过 NCCL 将新权重发送给生成器，而不丢弃当前正在生成的在途序列。从 GPU 到 GPU 广播权重至关重要，因为它将单次更新的时间减少到 5 秒以下，即使对于大型模型和大型世界规模也是如此。我们在图 3 中说明了这一过程。

items.en: As a solution is generated for a single prompt, it may experience multiple updates to the model weights, reflecting the latest improvements from the trainers. By the time it is fully processed and sent to the trainers, the model weights may have been updated several times, but the latest tokens are always generated on-policy. When updating the model weights, the hidden states previously stored in the key-value cache become slightly outdated because they were computed by previous versions of the model. For performance, we find that recomputing the key-value cache is not necessary, potentially due to off-policy corrections inherent to the loss function [Schulman et al., 2017].
items.zh: 当为单个提示生成解决方案时，模型权重可能会经历多次更新，反映出训练器的最新改进。到它被完全处理并发送给训练器时，模型权重可能已经更新了多次，但最新的词元始终是在策略上生成的。更新模型权重时，之前存储在键值缓存中的隐藏状态会略微过时，因为它们是由先前版本的模型计算的。出于性能考虑，我们发现重新计算键值缓存并非必要，这可能是由于损失函数中固有的离策略校正 [Schulman et al., 2017]。

items.en: We define a batch as a fixed number of generated completions, rather than a fixed number of tokens. Generators send each finished completion to a random trainer rank according to a pre-set permutation. A gradient update is performed when each data parallel rank has received enough completions to make a batch. If the trainers are the bottleneck, as is the case in early training when the generations are still short, we accumulate incoming generations into a blocking queue with a fixed size limit that controls off-policy degree. A batch may be partitioned into minibatches to perform several optimization steps (see Section 6.3). Each minibatch has a fixed number of completions but a variable number of tokens, so it is further divided into microbatches of a fixed token size. Since we accumulate the gradient over microbatches, the order of samples does not matter. We take advantage of this property to implement a greedy collation algorithm, sorting the sequences by descending size and trying to fit them one by one into a free microbatch if there is one or starting a new otherwise. This ensures a homogeneous workload across training workers for each minibatch, reducing padding by 19%.
items.zh: 我们将批次定义为固定数量的生成完成序列，而非固定数量的词元。生成器根据预设的排列将每个完成的序列发送给一个随机的训练器等级。当每个数据并行等级收到足够多的完成序列以构成一个批次时，执行一次梯度更新。如果训练器是瓶颈（例如在早期训练中生成序列仍然较短时），我们将传入的生成序列累积到一个具有固定大小限制的阻塞队列中，该限制控制离策略程度。一个批次可以划分为多个小批次以执行多次优化步骤（见第6.3节）。每个小批次有固定数量的完成序列但词元数量可变，因此进一步划分为固定词元大小的微批次。由于我们在微批次上累积梯度，样本的顺序无关紧要。我们利用这一特性实现了一种贪婪的整理算法，按降序对序列进行排序，并尝试将它们逐个放入空闲的微批次中（如果有），否则开始一个新的微批次。这确保了每个小批次中训练工作负载的均匀性，将填充减少了19%。

items.en: We limit ourselves to problems with verifiable solutions; we use mathematical problems whose solution is a numerical answer or expression, and code problems with associated tests. We apply extensive filtering, which we describe here.
items.zh: 我们仅限于具有可验证解决方案的问题；我们使用答案为数值或表达式的数学问题，以及带有相关测试的代码问题。我们应用了广泛的过滤，具体描述如下。

items.en: We started with a large but noisy problem set of around 700k samples. We first perform comprehensive pre-processing and filtering of the data to ensure all the problems are complete and that the final answers were accurate and verifiable with a rule-based system. Particularly, we filter proof-based and multi-part problems for which it is difficult to verify correctness. Furthermore, we reformulate multiple-choice problems into statement-based problems for more robust verification and increased difficulty.
items.zh: 我们从大约70万个样本的大型但嘈杂的问题集开始。我们首先对数据进行全面的预处理和过滤，以确保所有问题都是完整的，并且最终答案准确且可通过基于规则的系统验证。特别是，我们过滤了基于证明和多部分的问题，因为这类问题难以验证正确性。此外，我们将多项选择题重新表述为基于陈述的问题，以实现更稳健的验证并增加难度。

items.en: We implemented a two-stage filtering pipeline to curate a dataset of problems at a ‘goldilocks’ difficulty level, neither too easy nor too hard for the model to learn from. First, we performed an initial difficulty assessment using Mistral Large 2 [MistralAI, 2024], by sampling 1616 solutions for each problem and removing the ones that are either never solved or solved with a high success rate. This initial, curated set of problems was then used to train a 24B model via our online RL pipeline, resulting in a small but capable checkpoint which we use solely for grading.
items.zh: 我们实现了一个两阶段过滤流程，以策划一个难度适中的问题数据集，既不太容易也不太难以供模型学习。首先，我们使用Mistral Large 2 [MistralAI, 2024] 进行初始难度评估，为每个问题采样16个解决方案，并移除那些从未被解决或成功率很高的问题。这个初始策划的问题集随后通过我们的在线强化学习流程用于训练一个24B模型，产生了一个小型但能力强大的检查点，我们仅将其用于评分。

items.en: In the second stage, this stronger, RL-trained model was used to re-grade the entire original dataset. We again sampled 16 responses for each problem, filtering out the easiest and the still-unsolved problems. We then further filter out potentially incorrect problems where a majority of samples have the same final answer but disagree with the “ground-truth” answer. This is because when the model consistently reaches a consensus that contradicts the reference solution, the problems themselves are more likely to have wrong ground-truth answers.
items.zh: 在第二阶段，这个经过强化学习训练的更强模型被用于重新评分整个原始数据集。我们再次为每个问题采样16个响应，过滤掉最简单和仍未解决的问题。然后，我们进一步过滤掉可能不正确的问题，即大多数样本具有相同最终答案但与“真实”答案不一致的问题。这是因为当模型持续达成与参考答案相矛盾的共识时，问题本身更可能具有错误的真实答案。

items.en: This two-stage methodology was crucial because a single pass with the initial, weaker Mistral Large 2 model would have been insufficient. Its reasoning capabilities would likely have caused it to discard many genuinely difficult problems by incorrectly classifying them as unsolvable. By using a stronger, RL-trained model for a second pass, we ensured that these valuable and challenging training examples were accurately assessed and retained.
items.zh: 这种两阶段方法至关重要，因为仅使用初始较弱的Mistral Large 2模型进行一次通过是不够的。其推理能力可能导致它错误地将许多真正困难的问题归类为不可解而丢弃。通过使用更强的强化学习训练模型进行第二次通过，我们确保这些有价值的、具有挑战性的训练示例被准确评估并保留。

items.en: We gathered code contest data from various sources. Each data point includes a problem statement and, when available, correct solutions and related tests. For the training process, we want problem statements and a large number of correct tests per problem. In order to achieve this, we first remove any problems without solutions and without enough tests. Each solution is then executed on all available tests, and we discard tests with insufficient agreement. For tests with sufficient agreement but where no solution succeeded, we assume that the test is incorrect and update it to reflect the most common result among the solutions’ outputs. In cases where code problems lack tests, we generate additional tests and subject them to the same evaluation process.
items.zh: 我们从各种来源收集了代码竞赛数据。每个数据点包括一个问题陈述，以及（如果可用）正确的解决方案和相关测试。对于训练过程，我们希望每个问题都有问题陈述和大量正确的测试。为此，我们首先移除任何没有解决方案且没有足够测试的问题。然后，每个解决方案在所有可用测试上执行，我们丢弃一致性不足的测试。对于具有足够一致性但没有解决方案成功的测试，我们假设该测试不正确，并更新它以反映解决方案输出中最常见的结果。在代码问题缺乏测试的情况下，我们生成额外的测试并对它们进行相同的评估过程。

items.en: Finally, where applicable, problem statements are duplicated to require code in Python or C++, two commonly used languages in competitive programming. This process resulted in a dataset of 35k code problems.
items.zh: 最后，在适用的情况下，问题陈述被复制以要求使用Python或C++编写代码，这是竞争性编程中常用的两种语言。这个过程产生了一个包含3.5万个代码问题的数据集。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Overview of the filtering, training and RL stages discussed in the paper. We do RL over Mistral Medium 3 to get Magistral Medium. We use this model to generate answers for a large set of diverse prompts. We use these generated traces to finetune Mistral Small 3 and then perform RL to get Magistral Small.
items.capZh: 图4：本文讨论的过滤、训练和强化学习阶段概述。我们在Mistral Medium 3上进行强化学习以获得Magistral Medium。我们使用该模型为大量多样化提示生成答案。我们使用这些生成的轨迹对Mistral Small 3进行微调，然后进行强化学习以获得Magistral Small。

items.en: In this section we present the Magistral models. Our goal is to answer two questions: (i) how far can one get with pure reinforcement learning on a large base model? (ii) given a strong teacher model, how can one achieve the strongest possible lightweight model? To this end, we trained Magistral Medium, on top of Mistral Medium 3 [MistralAI, 2025] with pure RL; and Magistral Small, which began with SFT traces derived from Magistral Medium.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍Magistral模型。我们的目标是回答两个问题：（i）在大型基础模型上仅使用纯强化学习能走多远？（ii）给定一个强大的教师模型，如何实现最强大的轻量级模型？为此，我们在Mistral Medium 3 [MistralAI, 2025] 之上使用纯强化学习训练了Magistral Medium；以及Magistral Small，它从源自Magistral Medium的SFT轨迹开始。

items.en: We report results on benchmarks that assess capabilities in the fields of mathematics, coding, and STEM. For math, we provide results on the American Invitational Mathematics Examination benchmarks (AIME’24, AIME’25), and on the MATH dataset [Hendrycks et al., 2021]. In coding, we include LiveCodeBench (both v5 and v6 versions) [Jain et al., 2024], and Aider Polyglot [Gauthier, 2024]. For STEM, we report results based on the GPQA dataset [Rein et al., 2024]. Additionally, we also report our results on the text-only questions from Humanity’s Last Exam [Phan et al., 2025] which comprises of 2,500 questions across dozens of subjects, including mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences. For all evaluation tasks, we set the temperature to 0.7 and use a top-p of 1.0 for Math evals and GPQA, and 0.95 for coding tasks. The maximum token length is set to 40k for AIME and LiveCodeBench, and 32k for all other evaluations.
items.zh: 我们报告了评估数学、编程和STEM领域能力的基准测试结果。对于数学，我们提供了美国邀请数学考试基准（AIME'24，AIME'25）和MATH数据集 [Hendrycks et al., 2021] 的结果。在编程方面，我们包括LiveCodeBench（v5和v6版本）[Jain et al., 2024] 和Aider Polyglot [Gauthier, 2024]。对于STEM，我们基于GPQA数据集 [Rein et al., 2024] 报告结果。此外，我们还报告了在Humanity's Last Exam [Phan et al., 2025] 中仅文本问题上的结果，该考试包含2500个问题，涵盖数学、人文和自然科学等数十个学科。对于所有评估任务，我们将温度设置为0.7，对于数学评估和GPQA使用top-p为1.0，对于编程任务使用0.95。最大词元长度对于AIME和LiveCodeBench设置为40k，对于所有其他评估设置为32k。

items.en: For baselines we include results from [DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025], which reports comparable datapoints for training with RL at scale, both with and without SFT on traces from a reasoning model.
items.zh: 对于基线，我们包括来自 [DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025] 的结果，该结果报告了在规模上使用强化学习训练的可比数据点，包括使用和不使用来自推理模型的轨迹进行SFT。

full.sec: 5.2 Magistral Medium – reasoning RL from scratch

items.en: Here our goal is to evaluate the quality of our RL stack by training a model without any ‘cold start’ (i.e priming for reasoning by distillation of reasoning traces). We used Mistral Medium 3 Instruct [MistralAI, 2025] as the starting checkpoint for this run. Training was done in multiple stages with distinct hyper-parameters. Particularly, the stages were designed to ensure the following criteria were always satisfied:
items.zh: 这里我们的目标是通过训练一个没有“冷启动”（即通过蒸馏推理轨迹来启动推理）的模型来评估我们的强化学习栈的质量。我们使用Mistral Medium 3 Instruct [MistralAI, 2025] 作为本次运行的起始检查点。训练分多个阶段进行，具有不同的超参数。特别是，这些阶段旨在确保始终满足以下标准：

items.en: Dataset is not too easy. As the model performance increases, we increase the difficulty of the data. Harder data splits are constructed by including more complicated data (which were filtered out in earlier stages) or removing completely solved problems from the data.
items.zh: 数据集不会太容易。随着模型性能的提高，我们增加数据的难度。更难的数据划分是通过包含更复杂的数据（在早期阶段被过滤掉）或从数据中移除完全解决的问题来构建的。

items.en: Generation length does not stop growing. To prevent stagnation in generation length, we increase both maximal allowed completion length and maximal completion length lmax−lcachel_{\text{max}}-l_{\text{cache}} not punished by length penalty (c.f. Section 2.2.3). We increased lmax−lcachel_{\text{max}}-l_{\text{cache}} twice as 16​k→24​k16\text{k}\to 24\text{k} and 24​k→32​k24\text{k}\to 32\text{k}.
items.zh: 生成长度不会停止增长。为了防止生成长度停滞，我们增加最大允许完成长度和不受长度惩罚的最大完成长度 lmax−lcache（参见第2.2.3节）。我们将 lmax−lcache 增加了两次：16k→24k 和 24k→32k。

items.en: KV-cache memory burden is not too large. As generation length increases, the memory usage associated with the KV cache increases. To address this, we scale down the total number of concurrent requests running nasyncn_{\text{async}}, the batch size nbatchn_{\text{batch}}, and the minibatch size nminibatchn_{\text{minibatch}}. The impact of batch size is discussed in Section 6.3. During training we decreased batch size twice as 8​k→4​k8\text{k}\to 4\text{k} and 4​k→2​k4\text{k}\to 2\text{k}.
items.zh: KV缓存内存负担不会太大。随着生成长度的增加，与KV缓存相关的内存使用量也会增加。为了解决这个问题，我们按比例减少并发请求总数 nasync、批次大小 nbatch 和小批次大小 nminibatch。批次大小的影响在第6.3节中讨论。在训练期间，我们将批次大小减少了两次：8k→4k 和 4k→2k。

full.sec: 5.3 Magistral Small – RL on top of reasoning SFT bootstrapping

items.en: Given a strong ‘teacher’ model in Magistral Medium, we next explore how one can train the strongest possible student model. To do so, we train Magistral Small, which is ‘cold-started’ with SFT traces from Magistral Medium.
items.zh: 鉴于Magistral Medium是一个强大的“教师”模型，我们接下来探索如何训练最强大的学生模型。为此，我们训练了Magistral Small，它通过来自Magistral Medium的SFT轨迹进行“冷启动”。

items.en: In contrast with pure RL training (which benefits from a small set of extremely clean and difficult training points, Section 4), we find diversity of prompts to be important for the reasoning cold-start. We begin by extracting traces with correct answers from the RL training of Magistral Medium, excluding those from early steps with short CoTs. We also maintain a mixed difficulty level of the problems by limiting number of generations per problem to avoid biasing the collected traces towards easier problems and also upsampling problems with lower pass rates.
items.zh: 与纯强化学习训练（受益于一小部分极其干净和困难的训练点，第4节）相比，我们发现提示的多样性对于推理冷启动很重要。我们首先从Magistral Medium的强化学习训练中提取具有正确答案的轨迹，排除早期步骤中思维链较短的轨迹。我们还通过限制每个问题的生成次数来保持问题的混合难度水平，以避免收集的轨迹偏向于较容易的问题，并对通过率较低的问题进行上采样。

items.en: We augment this SFT cold-start data by generating responses from our Magistral Medium on a large set of diverse prompts, sourced from OpenThoughts [Guha et al., 2025] and the code subset of OpenR1 [Hugging Face, 2025, Penedo et al., 2025]. We perform additional filtering on top and kept a subset of the prompts. This gives us a reasoning dataset with mixed difficulty. We also include 10% of datapoints for general instruction tuning in order to preserve non-reasoning capabilities. We finetuned Mistral Small 3 Instruct (a 24-billion parameter model) for 4 epochs, and chose the best checkpoint on AIME’24 as the initial checkpoint for the following RL stage.
items.zh: 我们通过从Magistral Medium对大量多样化提示生成响应来扩充这个SFT冷启动数据，这些提示来自OpenThoughts [Guha et al., 2025] 和OpenR1 [Hugging Face, 2025, Penedo et al., 2025] 的代码子集。我们在此基础上进行额外的过滤，并保留了一部分提示。这为我们提供了一个混合难度的推理数据集。我们还包含了10%的通用指令微调数据点，以保留非推理能力。我们对Mistral Small 3 Instruct（一个240亿参数的模型）进行了4个周期的微调，并选择了AIME'24上最好的检查点作为后续强化学习阶段的初始检查点。

items.en: We then trained this SFT checkpoint with RL using a batch size of 2048 sequences, and a maximum non-penalized completion length lmax−lcachel_{\text{max}}-l_{\text{cache}} of 32k. We used a sampling temperature of 1.0 for our generations, as it provided the best balance between avoiding the lack of diversity seen at lower temperatures and the incoherent outputs generated at higher temperatures. We use a εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} of 0.3, to encourage exploration, as the cold-started model yielded responses with far lower entropy.
items.zh: 然后，我们使用批量大小为2048个序列、最大无惩罚完成长度l_max - l_cache为32k的RL训练这个SFT检查点。我们使用1.0的采样温度进行生成，因为这能在避免低温下缺乏多样性和高温下产生不连贯输出之间取得最佳平衡。我们使用ε_high为0.3来鼓励探索，因为冷启动模型产生的响应熵值要低得多。

items.en: To evaluate Magistral’s multilingual capabilities, we interacted with Magistral Medium in multiple languages to check that it could reason and answer in the user’s language. We also tested Magistral Medium on multilingual (French, Spanish, German, Italian, Russian, and Chinese) versions of the AIME 2024 benchmark. These multilingual versions were created by translating the questions from English into each of the languages. The results are presented in Table 4. We see that the model performs 4.3-9.9% lower on multilingual versions compared to English, which corresponds to 1-3 questions on the actual AIME test, possibly because we constrained the language of reasoning. This degradation is roughly similar to that of the base model. Note that on the multilingual benchmarks, all of the reasoning and the final response are conducted in the input language (i.e., not English).
items.zh: 为了评估Magistral的多语言能力，我们使用多种语言与Magistral Medium交互，以检查它能否用用户的语言进行推理和回答。我们还测试了Magistral Medium在AIME 2024基准测试的多语言版本（法语、西班牙语、德语、意大利语、俄语和中文）上的表现。这些多语言版本是通过将问题从英语翻译成每种语言创建的。结果如表4所示。我们看到，与英语版本相比，模型在多语言版本上的性能下降了4.3-9.9%，这对应于实际AIME测试中的1-3个问题，可能是因为我们限制了推理语言。这种退化与基础模型大致相似。注意，在多语言基准测试中，所有推理和最终响应都以输入语言（即非英语）进行。

items.en: In this section, we tweak parameters of the training process to investigate what happens when RL is performed on only one modality, compare RL to the distillation SFT baseline, and shed light on two training choices we had to reckon with, batch and minibatch size, and advantage normalization.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们调整训练过程的参数，以研究仅在单一模态上进行RL时会发生什么，将RL与蒸馏SFT基线进行比较，并阐明我们必须考虑的两个训练选择：批大小和小批量大小，以及优势归一化。

items.en: We investigate the ability of our model to generalize across domains by training on one domain (math or code) and evaluating on the other. Specifically, we conduct two experiments on the 24B model: one where the model is trained exclusively on math data and evaluated on both math and code, and another where it is trained only on code and evaluated similarly. As shown in Table 5, the model demonstrates strong performance to out-of-domain tasks, showcasing the generalization ability of RL.
items.zh: 我们通过在一个领域（数学或代码）上训练并在另一个领域上评估，来研究模型跨领域泛化的能力。具体来说，我们在24B模型上进行了两个实验：一个实验是模型仅在数学数据上训练，并在数学和代码上评估；另一个实验是模型仅在代码上训练，并进行类似评估。如表5所示，模型在跨领域任务上表现出强大的性能，展示了RL的泛化能力。

full.sec: 6.2 Distillation vs. RL for small models

items.en: Previous works [DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025] have observed that smaller models relying solely on RL may not be able to achieve performance comparable to those distilled from larger reasoning models. However, our findings contradict this observation: we achieved strong results even with pure RL on top of Mistral Small 3. As shown in Figure 5, our Mistral Small 3 with pure RL achieves similar performance on AIME’24 as the distilled version. It even outperforms the distilled version on MATH and GPQA, but has slightly lower performance on code benchmarks such as LiveCodeBench. These results suggest that the benefits of RL are not exclusive to larger base models and hold equally well for smaller models. Furthermore, our findings indicate that the RL on top of the distilled checkpoint can yield even better performance, leading to over 5 points gain across various benchmarks.
items.zh: 先前的工作[DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025]观察到，仅依赖RL的较小模型可能无法达到与从较大推理模型蒸馏得到的模型相当的性能。然而，我们的发现与这一观察相矛盾：即使在Mistral Small 3上仅使用纯RL，我们也取得了强劲的结果。如图5所示，我们的Mistral Small 3使用纯RL在AIME'24上达到了与蒸馏版本相似的性能。它甚至在MATH和GPQA上优于蒸馏版本，但在LiveCodeBench等代码基准测试上性能略低。这些结果表明，RL的好处并不仅限于较大的基础模型，对较小模型同样适用。此外，我们的发现表明，在蒸馏检查点之上进行RL可以产生更好的性能，在各种基准测试上获得超过5个点的提升。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Performance of Magistral Small compared with different training setups on various benchmarks. We report the performance of three distinct 24B models: Mistral Small 24B trained from scratch with RL (RL only), Mistral Small 24B fine-tuned on reasoning traces from Magistral Medium, and Mistral Small 24B fine-tuned on Magistral Medium traces and subsequently enhanced with RL, which is the final Magistral Small. We observe that the combination of fine-tuning on reasoning traces with RL leads to the best performance.
items.capZh: 图5：Magistral Small在不同训练设置下在各种基准测试上的性能。我们报告了三种不同的24B模型的性能：从头开始使用RL训练的Mistral Small 24B（仅RL）、在Magistral Medium的推理轨迹上微调的Mistral Small 24B、以及在Magistral Medium轨迹上微调并随后用RL增强的Mistral Small 24B，即最终的Magistral Small。我们观察到，在推理轨迹上微调与RL的结合带来了最佳性能。

items.en: Reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms like PPO or GRPO introduce two distinct batch scales. The batch size, denoted as nbatchn_{\text{batch}}, refers to the number of sequences collected before updating the generator’s weights. The minibatch size, nminibatchn_{\text{minibatch}}, indicates the number of sequences used to compute the gradient and perform a single optimization step. It is important to note that nminibatchn_{\text{minibatch}} must divide nbatchn_{\text{batch}}. Additionally, in an asynchronous RL pipeline, a third scale is introduced: the number of concurrent sequences, nasyncn_{\text{async}}, which represents the number of sequences being generated in parallel. If the number of concurrently generated sequences nasyncn_{\text{async}} is much larger than the batch size nbatchn_{\text{batch}}, a typical sequence was generated with nasync/nbatchn_{\text{async}}/n_{\text{batch}} different policies and could be too off-policy. The effect becomes worse as we do more than one minibatch update per one batch.
items.zh: 像PPO或GRPO这样的强化学习（RL）算法引入了两种不同的批尺度。批大小，记为n_batch，指的是在更新生成器权重之前收集的序列数量。小批量大小，n_minibatch，表示用于计算梯度并执行单次优化步骤的序列数量。需要注意的是，n_minibatch必须能整除n_batch。此外，在异步RL流水线中，引入了第三个尺度：并发序列数n_async，表示并行生成的序列数量。如果并发生成的序列数n_async远大于批大小n_batch，那么一个典型序列是由n_async/n_batch个不同策略生成的，可能过于离策略。当每批进行多于一次小批量更新时，这种影响会变得更糟。

items.en: To test this hypothesis we prepared a strong 3B model using SFT starting from Ministral 3B, and then trained it using GRPO on math-only data with a constant learning rate, a fixed nasync=4096n_{\text{async}}=4096, and different values of nbatchn_{\text{batch}} and nminibatchn_{\text{minibatch}} in {1024,2048,4096,8192}\{1024,2048,4096,8192\}.
items.zh: 为了验证这一假设，我们准备了一个强大的3B模型，从Ministral 3B开始使用SFT，然后使用GRPO在仅数学数据上以恒定学习率、固定的n_async=4096以及不同的n_batch和n_minibatch值（来自{1024,2048,4096,8192}）进行训练。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Impact of batch and minibatch sizes on RL training rewards. (a) Reward during RL training of 3B model on math data for different batch sizes, while keeping minibatch size equal to batch size. Number of concurrently generated sequences is kept constant at 4096. (b) Reward during RL training in the same setup for different minibatch sizes at fixed batch size of 8192 sequences. We observe that performance doesn’t depend strongly on batch size, but degrades when there are more than 2 minibatches in a batch.
items.capZh: 图6：批大小和小批量大小对RL训练奖励的影响。(a) 在数学数据上对3B模型进行RL训练时，不同批大小下的奖励，同时保持小批量大小等于批大小。并发生成的序列数保持恒定在4096。(b) 在相同设置下，固定批大小为8192个序列时，不同小批量大小下的RL训练奖励。我们观察到，性能对批大小不敏感，但当一批中有超过2个小批量时，性能会下降。

items.en: We observe that as long as we keep nbatch=nminibatchn_{\text{batch}}=n_{\text{minibatch}} and that nbatchn_{\text{batch}} is large enough, the performance is very similar when plotted depending on the number of processed prompts, as can be seen in Figure 6 (a). On the other hand, when nminibatchn_{\text{minibatch}} is decreased while keeping nbatchn_{\text{batch}} constant, the performance suddenly degrades, even when compared to nbatchn_{\text{batch}} reduced to the same nminibatchn_{\text{minibatch}}, as highlighted in Figure 6 (b). When nbatch≤1024n_{\text{batch}}\leq 1024, the training becomes less stable, so we opt to keep ratio nasync/nbatch≤2n_{\text{async}}/n_{\text{batch}}\leq 2 and nbatch=nminibatchn_{\text{batch}}=n_{\text{minibatch}} during final training and further ablations.
items.zh: 我们观察到，只要保持n_batch=n_minibatch且n_batch足够大，性能在按处理提示数绘制时非常相似，如图6(a)所示。另一方面，当n_minibatch减小而n_batch保持不变时，性能突然下降，即使与n_batch减小到相同n_minibatch的情况相比也是如此，如图6(b)所示。当n_batch≤1024时，训练变得不太稳定，因此我们在最终训练和进一步消融中选择保持比率n_async/n_batch≤2且n_batch=n_minibatch。

items.en: We experimented with the following advantage normalization methods:
items.zh: 我们实验了以下优势归一化方法：

items.en: Minibatch - normalize advantages within a minibatch
items.zh: 小批量归一化 - 在小批量内归一化优势

items.en: Group normalization - normalize advantages within a group over a single prompt
items.zh: 组归一化 - 在单个提示的组内归一化优势

items.en: No normalization - do not normalize advantages
items.zh: 无归一化 - 不归一化优势

items.en: Previous works [Liu et al., 2025, Andrychowicz et al., 2020] have noted that normalization over a group of generations for a given question can lead to a bias where easy questions or hard questions are upweighted due to their lower standard deviation values. However, we did not observe any significant effects on evaluation performance or the growth of the length as shown in Figure 7. Hence, we decided to use minibatch normalization for all our experiments.
items.zh: 先前的工作[Liu et al., 2025, Andrychowicz et al., 2020]指出，对给定问题的生成组进行归一化可能导致偏差，即简单问题或困难问题因其较低的标准差值而被过度加权。然而，我们没有观察到对评估性能或长度增长有任何显著影响，如图7所示。因此，我们决定在所有实验中使用小批量归一化。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Results for training with different advantage normalizations in GRPO. We observe that different normalization methods do not lead to significant difference either in evaluation performance or the length growth during training.
items.capZh: 图7：GRPO中使用不同优势归一化进行训练的结果。我们观察到，不同的归一化方法在评估性能或训练期间的长度增长方面没有导致显著差异。

items.en: In this section, we investigate the dynamics of RL training and present evidence that increasing completion length is the main resource that improves the performance of the model. Those dynamics are not destructive to previous capabilities, and the reasoning capabilities can even generalize: multimodal reasoning gets improved for free, and function calling and instruction following remain unchanged or even get a small boost. Additionally, we discuss two ideas that didn’t work for us - giving more fine-grained rewards in code tasks based on test completion rate and controlling entropy via entropy bonus term in the loss.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们研究RL训练的动力学，并提出证据表明增加完成长度是提高模型性能的主要资源。这些动力学不会破坏先前的能力，推理能力甚至可以泛化：多模态推理得到免费改进，函数调用和指令遵循保持不变甚至略有提升。此外，我们讨论了两个对我们无效的想法：基于测试完成率在代码任务中提供更细粒度的奖励，以及通过损失中的熵奖励项控制熵。

full.sec: 7.1 Reinforcement learning moves weights in low-dimensional space
full.secZh: 7.1 强化学习在低维空间中移动权重

items.en: To better understand the dynamics of Magistral during RL training, we follow the method of [Li et al., 2018] to analyze the Magistral Small RL-only run and visualize the loss landscape around the final checkpoint.
items.zh: 为了更好地理解Magistral在RL训练期间的动力学，我们遵循[Li et al., 2018]的方法分析Magistral Small仅RL运行，并可视化最终检查点周围的损失景观。

items.en: First, we stack the weights of all intermediate checkpoints in a matrix X∈ℝT×WX\in\mathbb{R}^{T\times W}, where TT is the number of checkpoints and WW is the number of weights. Then, we subtract the mean weights across the TT checkpoints and perform a PCA analysis to find two principal components of the matrix XX in the weight space. Since the weight space is very high-dimensional, we use the iterative Lanczos-Arnoldi algorithm [Saad, 2003] to find the top-2 eigenvectors of XT​XX^{T}X. As a result, we obtain two components c1c_{1} and c2c_{2} that we L2-normalize to have a unit norm.
items.zh: 首先，我们将所有中间检查点的权重堆叠成矩阵X∈ℝ^{T×W}，其中T是检查点数量，W是权重数量。然后，我们减去T个检查点上的平均权重，并进行PCA分析，以在权重空间中找到矩阵X的两个主成分。由于权重空间非常高维，我们使用迭代Lanczos-Arnoldi算法[Saad, 2003]找到X^T X的前两个特征向量。结果，我们得到两个分量c1和c2，我们对其进行L2归一化以获得单位范数。

items.en: Second, we perturb the final checkpoint weights w∗∈ℝWw^{*}\in\mathbb{R}^{W} by adding two components as
items.zh: 其次，我们通过添加两个分量来扰动最终检查点权重w*∈ℝ^W，如下所示：

items.en: We evaluate each perturbed checkpoint on a fixed batch of 512 prompts, generating 16 completions per prompt, and using the same reward setting as in Magistral Small RL-only run. Finally, we compute mean reward and mean output length for each checkpoint and plot it in (α1,α2)(\alpha_{1},\alpha_{2}) coordinates.
items.zh: 我们在固定的512个提示批次上评估每个扰动检查点，每个提示生成16个补全，并使用与Magistral Small纯RL运行相同的奖励设置。最后，我们计算每个检查点的平均奖励和平均输出长度，并在(α1,α2)坐标中绘制。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Reward and length evolution in w​(α1,α2)w(\alpha_{1},\alpha_{2}) hyperplane. Black arrow trajectory is a projection of intermediate checkpoints of Magistral Small RL-only run on the hyperplane. Black points are perturbed checkpoints computed using Equation 2. Intermediate values are computed with linear interpolation on the triangular grid.
items.capZh: 图8：w(α1,α2)超平面中的奖励和长度演化。黑色箭头轨迹是Magistral Small纯RL运行中间检查点在超平面上的投影。黑点是使用公式2计算的扰动检查点。中间值通过三角形网格上的线性插值计算。

items.en: We clearly observe that there is a “length” direction - as model goes from right to left in Figure 8, mean reward and output length grow up until the point where length starts to hit length penalty and maximally allowed completion length. We additionally plot dependence of raw reward without length penalty on output length, observing a ubiquitous log scaling in Figure 9.
items.zh: 我们清楚地观察到存在一个“长度”方向——当模型从图8的右向左移动时，平均奖励和输出长度增长，直到长度开始触及长度惩罚和最大允许补全长度。我们还绘制了无长度惩罚的原始奖励与输出长度的关系，观察到图9中普遍的对数缩放。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Reward scaling with output length. Each point corresponds to a perturbed checkpoint computed with Equation 2. We generate 8192 completions with the checkpoint and evaluate mean output length and raw reward (reward without length penalty). We perform linear regression on checkpoints with mean output length between 1500 and 8000 and observe that reward scales logarithmically with the output length.
items.capZh: 图9：奖励随输出长度的缩放。每个点对应使用公式2计算的扰动检查点。我们使用该检查点生成8192个补全，并评估平均输出长度和原始奖励（无长度惩罚的奖励）。我们对平均输出长度在1500到8000之间的检查点进行线性回归，观察到奖励随输出长度对数缩放。

items.en: The initial checkpoints utilized for RL training, Mistral Small 3 and Mistral Medium 3, are multimodal models and come with associated vision encoders. During the RL training phase, as the models are trained on text-only data, one might expect the multimodal performance to degrade. However, on the contrary, we discover that the models not only retain their multimodal capabilities, but unexpectedly develop enhanced multimodal reasoning abilities. The resulting models also showcase improved performance on multimodal benchmarks.
items.zh: 用于RL训练的初始检查点Mistral Small 3和Mistral Medium 3是多模态模型，并带有相关的视觉编码器。在RL训练阶段，由于模型仅在文本数据上训练，人们可能预期多模态性能会下降。然而，相反，我们发现模型不仅保留了多模态能力，而且意外地发展了增强的多模态推理能力。得到的模型还在多模态基准上展示了改进的性能。

items.en: We report results multimodal benchmarks designed to assess reasoning capabilities, specifically MathVista [Lu et al., 2024], MMMU [Yue et al., 2024], and MMMU-Pro [Yue et al., 2025]. Our results in Figure 10 show no performance regression across most benchmarks, with notable improvements observed on MMMU (+5%, reaching 70%), MMMU-Pro-Standard (+4.4%, reaching 57.9%) and MMMU-Pro-Vision (+12%, reaching 52.1%). While the most significant improvements are seen in scientific questions that require textual reasoning, we observe that the model transfers its extended thinking process across all types of questions (see Figures 14 15 16 for qualitative examples).
items.zh: 我们报告了旨在评估推理能力的多模态基准结果，特别是MathVista [Lu等人，2024]、MMMU [Yue等人，2024]和MMMU-Pro [Yue等人，2025]。我们在图10中的结果显示，大多数基准没有性能退化，在MMMU（+5%，达到70%）、MMMU-Pro-Standard（+4.4%，达到57.9%）和MMMU-Pro-Vision（+12%，达到52.1%）上观察到显著改进。虽然最显著的改进出现在需要文本推理的科学问题上，但我们观察到模型将其扩展的思考过程转移到了所有类型的问题上（定性示例见图14、15、16）。

full.sec: 7.3 Impact of RL on other capabilities

items.en: Similar to the multimodal capabilities mentioned in Section 7.2, our RL checkpoint maintains and even improves its tool calling and instruction following capabilities [Zhou et al., 2023] (Table 6). This allows us to integrate the model out-of-the-box with existing tools as shown.
items.zh: 与第7.2节中提到的多模态能力类似，我们的RL检查点保持甚至改进了其工具调用和指令遵循能力[Zhou等人，2023]（表6）。这使得我们能够将模型与现有工具开箱即用地集成，如图所示。

items.en: In this section, we present various approaches that we tried but ultimately did not adopt, as they did not yield any performance improvements.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍了各种尝试过但最终未采用的方法，因为它们没有带来性能提升。

items.en: The strict requirements of competitive programming, in terms of correctness and adherence to complexity constraints, result in sparse rewards, often causing many code generations to be discarded due to limited reward diversity.
items.zh: 竞争性编程的严格要求，在正确性和复杂度约束方面，导致奖励稀疏，通常由于奖励多样性有限，许多代码生成被丢弃。

items.en: To address this, we experimented with a proportional reward: based on the fraction of tests passed, as opposed to the binary reward discussed in Section 2.2.2. In an ablation with a 24B model over 250 steps, we found that training with proportional rewards was faster, discarding three times less data. However, this approach led to slightly lower final performance on benchmarks, with a 2% decrease on LiveCodeBench (Figure 11a), and slower growth in generation length (Figure 11b).
items.zh: 为了解决这个问题，我们尝试了比例奖励：基于通过的测试比例，而不是第2.2.2节中讨论的二元奖励。在使用24B模型进行250步的消融实验中，我们发现使用比例奖励训练更快，丢弃的数据少三倍。然而，这种方法导致基准上的最终性能略低，LiveCodeBench下降2%（图11a），生成长度增长较慢（图11b）。

items.en: The hope was that a reward based on the fraction of tests passed should provide a richer signal than a simple pass/fail for RL training. However, the potential issue is that partial rewards could also provide false signal to incorrect solutions and be more sensitive to minor inconsistencies between implementations, potentially leading to less meaningful training batches.
items.zh: 希望基于通过测试比例的比例奖励能为RL训练提供比简单通过/失败更丰富的信号。然而，潜在的问题是部分奖励也可能为不正确的解决方案提供错误信号，并且对实现之间的微小不一致更敏感，可能导致训练批次的意义降低。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Binary vs proportional reward for code problems. (a) Accuracy on AIME and LiveCodeBench after 250 steps of training with binary reward and proportional reward. Performance on LiveCodeBench is 2% lower with proportional rewards. (b) Length evolution throughout training. Length increases more with binary rewards.
items.capZh: 图11：代码问题的二元奖励与比例奖励。(a) 使用二元奖励和比例奖励训练250步后在AIME和LiveCodeBench上的准确率。使用比例奖励时LiveCodeBench性能低2%。(b) 训练过程中的长度演化。二元奖励下长度增加更多。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Impact of εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} on the entropy distribution throughout training. (a) Entropy evolution throughout training of a 3B model on a math only dataset. Entropy drops with entropy bonus, while higher εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} maintains entropy, allowing for better exploration. (b) Entropy evolution throughout training of a 3B model on a math and code dataset. Entropy explodes with entropy bonus, even though the coefficient is the same as the math only version. Higher εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} behaves better, allowing entropy to decrease.
items.capZh: 图12：εhigh对训练过程中熵分布的影响。(a) 3B模型在纯数学数据集上训练过程中的熵演化。熵随熵奖励下降，而较高的εhigh维持熵，允许更好的探索。(b) 3B模型在数学和代码数据集上训练过程中的熵演化。熵随熵奖励激增，即使系数与纯数学版本相同。较高的εhigh表现更好，允许熵下降。

items.en: To encourage exploration and prevent entropy collapse during RL training, a common strategy in the literature [Schulman et al., 2017] is to add an entropy bonus loss term. However, we found this strategy to be unstable as the effect of the entropy bonus varies significantly depending on the dataset. For a math-only dataset, entropy drops with the entropy bonus, while a higher εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} maintains entropy, enhancing exploration (Figure 12a). On a math and code dataset, entropy increases excessively with the entropy bonus (even with the same coefficient as in the math-only run), while a higher εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}} allows entropy to decrease, improving exploitation (Figure 12b).
items.zh: 为了鼓励探索并防止RL训练中熵崩溃，文献中常见策略[Schulman等人，2017]是添加熵奖励损失项。然而，我们发现这一策略不稳定，因为熵奖励的效果随数据集变化显著。对于纯数学数据集，熵随熵奖励下降，而较高的εhigh维持熵，增强探索（图12a）。在数学和代码数据集上，熵随熵奖励过度增加（即使系数与纯数学运行相同），而较高的εhigh允许熵下降，改善利用（图12b）。

items.en: Instead, we found it more effective to depend on εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}}, as also noted in literature [Yu et al., 2025, Wang et al., 2025]. This method avoids the instability issues associated with entropy bonuses.
items.zh: 相反，我们发现依赖εhigh更有效，正如文献[Yu等人，2025，Wang等人，2025]所指出的。这种方法避免了与熵奖励相关的不稳定性问题。

items.en: Another approach for controlling entropy is adding a KL term to the PPO loss. However, as the generation distribution is expected to deviate significantly from the original model, we found that using a KL penalty primarily hinders training, consistent with previous findings [Yu et al., 2025]. We attempted using an exponential moving average of the weights during training as a reference for KL, but found it simpler to manually adjust εhigh\varepsilon_{\text{high}}.
items.zh: 另一种控制熵的方法是在PPO损失中添加KL项。然而，由于生成分布预计会与原始模型显著偏离，我们发现使用KL惩罚主要阻碍训练，这与先前发现[Yu等人，2025]一致。我们尝试在训练中使用权重的指数移动平均作为KL的参考，但发现手动调整εhigh更简单。

items.capEn: Figure 13: Benchmark performance of Magistral Medium fine-tuned on open-source traces. All results are reported using pass@1. The shaded region highlights the additional improvement achieved through RL on top of supervised fine-tuning. We find that while fine-tuning on open-source traces yields strong results, applying RL further enhances performance significantly. In particular, the accuracy on AIME’25 increases by more than 12%. Please note that the performance on GPQA Diamond drops after RL from 72.9% to 71.0%.
items.capZh: 图13：在开源轨迹上微调的Magistral Medium的基准性能。所有结果使用pass@1报告。阴影区域突出显示了在监督微调基础上通过RL实现的额外改进。我们发现，虽然在开源轨迹上微调产生了强劲的结果，但应用RL进一步显著提升了性能。特别是，AIME'25上的准确率提高了超过12%。请注意，GPQA Diamond上的性能在RL后从72.9%下降到71.0%。

full.sec: 8 RL on model finetuned using OSS reasoning traces
full.secZh: 8 在基于开源推理轨迹微调的模型上应用RL

items.en: As an experiment, we also tried to first finetune Mistral Medium 3 using open source reasoning datasets OpenThoughts [Guha et al., 2025] and the code subset of OpenR1 [Hugging Face, 2025, Penedo et al., 2025] including both the prompts and the generations from these datasets i.e. Deepseek R1 generated traces. This included a total of about 1.3M generations. We then run RL on top of this finetuned checkpoint using our most difficult subset of the data. As shown in Figure 13, applying RL yields substantial performance gains over the SFT checkpoint. Notably, the RL model improves by over 10 points on AIME’25 and 5 points on LiveCodeBench, achieving a final performance level on par with Deepseek-R1 on code and math benchmarks.
items.zh: 作为实验，我们还尝试首先使用开源推理数据集OpenThoughts [Guha等人，2025]和OpenR1 [Hugging Face，2025，Penedo等人，2025]的代码子集（包括这些数据集中的提示和生成，即Deepseek R1生成的轨迹）对Mistral Medium 3进行微调。这总共包括约130万次生成。然后，我们使用数据中最难的子集在此微调检查点上运行RL。如图13所示，应用RL在SFT检查点上产生了显著的性能提升。值得注意的是，RL模型在AIME'25上提高了超过10分，在LiveCodeBench上提高了5分，在代码和数学基准上达到了与Deepseek-R1相当的性能水平。

items.en: Magistral is our first step towards generally capable systems with reinforcement learning. We look forward to the next research problems ahead of us: what loss and optimization algorithms are the most appropriate, how much gain can be unlocked by bootstrapping a model on its own reasoning traces, or how to scale to the next order of magnitude of compute. Looking ahead, we are also excited to push the boundaries of RL across a whole range of applications, with tool-use, integrated multimodality, and agents. As we explore this frontier, we remain committed to contributing to science in a transparent and optimistic manner.
items.zh: Magistral是我们迈向具有强化学习的通用能力系统的第一步。我们期待面前的下一个研究问题：哪些损失和优化算法最合适，通过让模型自举其自身的推理轨迹可以解锁多少收益，或者如何将算力扩展到下一个数量级。展望未来，我们也兴奋地推动RL在广泛的应用领域中的边界，包括工具使用、集成多模态和智能体。在探索这一前沿时，我们仍然致力于以透明和乐观的方式为科学做出贡献。
